column1: # Women's Empowerment Index scores for 25 Indian states
# Formula: WEI = (Empowerment x 0.25) + (Education x 0.20) + (Economic x 0.20) + (Health x 0.15) - (Crime x 0.20)

column18: key_programs
column20: notes

column18: Kudumbashree (1998) — 46 lakh members, Asia's largest women's SHG network
column20: Highest female literacy (95.2%). Kudumbashree integrated with half of Kerala families.

column18: Goa Mahila Aarthik Vikas Mahamandal microfinance
column20: Highest HDI in India. Strong female literacy and health outcomes.

column18: Tamil Nadu Corporation for Development of Women; Uzhavar Sandhai women vendors
column20: Strong reservation in panchayats. Above-average female literacy at 73.9%.

column18: Mizoram Women's Commission; Young Mizo Association women's wing
column20: Highest female literacy in Northeast (89.4%). Low crime rate.

column18: Meghalaya Livelihoods and Access to Markets (MLAM) women SHGs
column20: Matrilineal society (Khasi and Jaintia tribes). Women own property and pass family name — one of India's most gender-equal cultures.

column18: HP State Women's Commission; women-led MGNREGA groups
column20: High female literacy (76.6%). Strong panchayat women's reservation.

column18: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative; Mission Bhagiratha women SHGs
column20: Strong SHG movement inherited from Andhra Pradesh bifurcation.

column18: SERP (Society for Elimination of Rural Poverty); Velugu/IKP program
column20: pioneered SHG-bank linkage model, scaled nationally as NRLM.

column18: Stree Shakti SHG program; Karnataka Mahila Abhivrudhi Yojana
column20: Mysuru, Dharwad districts show strong women's enterprise activity.

column18: Ima Keithel (Mothers' Market) — world's largest all-women market
column20: Unique matrilineal trading traditions. Ima Keithel in Imphal is an extraordinary example of women's economic autonomy.

column18: SEWA (Self Employed Women's Association) — 3.78M members, 20 states; SEWA Bank (1974) — pioneered global microfinance
column20: SEWA founded here in 1972. One of world's most influential women's labour organisations. Strong women's enterprise and cooperative sector.

column18: Mahila Mangal Dal forest groups; Van Panchayats women leaders
column20: Women lead forest governance. Above-average literacy for hill state.

column18: Mann Deshi Bank (100K+ women); Mahila Arthik Vikas Mahamandal (MAVIM); Pune District Women's Enterprise program
column20: Strong urban women's enterprise ecosystem. Mann Deshi Bank pioneered rural women's banking. Mumbai has India's highest women's workforce.

column18: Punjab Women Development Corporation; ATMA women farmer groups
column20: Improving female literacy. Strong women's panchayat representation.

column18: Delhi Mahila Kosh microfinance; Mahila Panchayat scheme
column20: High urban crime rate pulls score down significantly despite strong education.

column18: Lakshmi Bhandar (24.1M), Kanyashree (10M girls, UNESCO prize), Rupashree (2.3M), Swasthya Sathi (2.42M)
column20: Fastest-improving state. Lakshmi Bhandar is world's largest women's direct cash transfer. Kanyashree won UN Public Service Award.

column18: Mission Shakti SHG network — 70 lakh women members
column20: Mission Shakti is one of India's largest state SHG programs.

column18: Chhattisgarh Women's Self Help Group Mission; tribal women's cooperatives
column20: Strong tribal women's forest rights movement. Above-average panchayat representation for women.

column18: Assam Mahila Samakhya; tea garden women's cooperatives
column20: High MMR remains a challenge. Tea garden workers face economic vulnerability.

column18: Educate Girls (6.7M beneficiaries, 380K+ girls enrolled); Rajasthan Gramin Aajeevika Vikas Parishad SHGs
column20: Educate Girls has transformed female enrollment in rural Rajasthan. Child marriage remains a challenge despite declining rates.

column18: Mahila Samridhi Yojana; Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (origin state)
column20: Lowest sex ratio at birth in India (historically). Active Beti Bachao program has improved ratio from 832 to 916 per 1000 male births.

column18: Educate Girls (operates in MP); Tejaswini Rural Women's Empowerment
column20: Among India's highest rape reporting rates (NCRB). Educate Girls active in Rajasthan and MP.

column18: Jharkhand State Livelihood Promotion Society (JSLPS) women SHGs
column20: Large tribal population. Women's forest rights and land ownership remain significant challenges.

column18: JEEViKA — 1.04M SHGs, 34,000+ villages, ₹11,000+ crore bank credit; Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojana (girl child incentive scheme)
column20: JEEViKA is India's most successful rural livelihood program, scaled nationally as NRLM. Bihar has lowest female LFPR in India (4-6%) but JEEViKA is transforming economic outcomes at scale.

column18: UP State Rural Livelihoods Mission (UPSRLM) SHGs; Mahila Shakti Kendras (one-stop centres)
column20: India's most populous state. High crime rate and low female literacy drive score down. UPSRLM has 9M+ SHG members — significant scale.
